an10.213:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, possessing ten qualities, women are deposited in hell as if brought there. What ten?
(1) They destroy life …
… and (10) hold wrong view. Possessing these ten qualities, women are deposited in hell as if brought there.
an10.213:1.2:
2
"Bhikkhus, possessing ten qualities, women are deposited in heaven as if brought there. What ten? (1) They abstain from the destruction of life …
… and (10) hold right view. Possessing these ten qualities, women are deposited in heaven as if brought there."
